title: Flights & Flatbread with Kosta Browne
description: Explore Kosta Browne through a focused Whispering Vine tasting, paired with Mushroom, leeks, fennel fontina sausage flatbread.

price.note: Price includes a flatbread and a tasting of Kosta Browne Wines. If you buy a bottle, the tasting fee will be waived
